summary: Comprehensive testing of Universal Privacy Layer P0 and P1 features. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working: Landing page, Dashboard, Hidden Balance, Transaction History, Dual Seed Setup, NFT Privacy, Token Approval Privacy, Contract Privacy, and Chain Status pages.
passed_tests: GET /api/health → 200, status='healthy'
GET /api/stats → 200, returns platform statistics with live_chains, contracts
GET /api/chains → 200, returns 7 EVM chains configuration
GET /api/balance/hidden/{address} → 200, returns aggregated balances across all 7 chains
GET /api/transactions/history/{address} → 200, returns transaction history with direction
POST /api/wallet/create → 200, creates dual seed wallet with main + privacy addresses
POST /api/wallet/register-privacy → 200, registers privacy keys for wallet
GET /api/wallet/privacy/{address} → 200, retrieves privacy wallet info
POST /api/stealth/generate → 200, generates stealth address on multiple chains
POST /api/nft/proxy → 200, creates NFT privacy proxy for buy/sell/transfer/bid
POST /api/approval/create-disposable → 200, creates disposable approval address
POST /api/contract/proxy → 200, creates anonymous contract execution proxy
GET /api/tokens/base → 200, returns Base chain tokens
GET /api/tokens/invalid → 400, correctly rejects invalid chain
Landing page: Globe animation, '7 Chains Live' badge, 'Connect MetaMask' button
Dashboard: Balance card, Hidden (Stealth) Balance, Private Receive/Send/Swap tiles
Dashboard: Advanced Privacy section with all 7 feature tiles
Hidden Balance page: Shows aggregated balances across all 7 chains with stealth address count
Transaction History page: Shows empty state with proper messaging
Dual Seed Setup page: 3-step wizard with Generate/Backup/Complete flow
NFT Privacy page: Form with contract address, token ID, action dropdown, Create button
Token Approval Privacy page: Form with token contract, spender, Create Disposable button
Contract Privacy page: Form with contract address, function name, Create Anonymous Proxy button
Chain Status page: EVM Chains (7 Live), Solana (Coming Soon), Sui (Coming Soon)
seed_data_creation: Test data created during API testing: wallets, stealth addresses, privacy registrations, NFT proxies, disposable approvals, contract proxies
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features (Hidden Balance, Transaction History, Dual Seed Wallet) and P1 features (NFT Privacy, Token Approval Privacy, Contract Privacy) are fully implemented and working. Backend has 7 EVM chains live (Base, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism, BNB Chain, Avalanche, Hyperliquid). Frontend dashboard shows all navigation tiles correctly. Chain Status page shows all chains with proper Live/Coming Soon indicators. No issues found during testing.
